title: JD Vance takes aim at Biden, Harris during rally
shortDescription: In his second Monday campaign stop, Republican Vice-Presidential nominee Sen. Vance railed against Harris at a rally in Virginia to applause and cheers from a crowd of hundreds.

title: Harris thanks Biden for endorsement
shortDescription: Vice President Kamala Harris thanks President Joe Biden for his endorsement during a campaign press conference in Delaware.

title: 'I'm watching you, kid': Joe Biden dials into Harris's debut to campaign staff
shortDescription: Harris's first visit to her campaign headquarters featured a surprise call from Biden. But the lovefest soon turned to an attack on Trump.

title: With DNC virtual vote ahead, Harris close to locking Democratic nomination
shortDescription: The Democratic National Committee in a new memo says that the nominating process will have an electronic voting component.

title: Democratic lawmakers react to Biden dropping out of 2024 election
shortDescription: Democratic representatives shared their thoughts on the next steps in the presidential nomination process ahead of the Democratic National Convention.

title: How do Harris and Trump compare in recent swing state polls?
shortDescription: Here’s how Harris would fare against Trump in the seven key swing states, according to the most recent polls.

title: Biden recovering well from COVID, his doctor says
shortDescription: Biden's COVID symptoms are nearly gone five days after he tested positive

title: Pelosi endorses Harris to defeat Trump
shortDescription: America awoke to an upended 2024 election race after President Joe Biden dropped out and endorsed VP Kamala Harris in the fight to beat Donald Trump.

title: OnPolitics: Biden's decision to halt race stirs fear, excitement
shortDescription: Joe Biden's decision to halt his reelection effort upended the day-to-day lives of Americans still reeling from the attempted assassination of Trump.

title: Election odds take shape with Trump, Harris likely presidential candidates
shortDescription: Bettors lengthened the odds of still favorite Donald Trump in the presidential race in the day after President Biden announced he would drop out.

title: 7 takeaways as Kamala Harris takes the torch from Joe Biden
shortDescription: Vice President Kamala Harris effectively cleared the field for the Democratic nomination one day after President Joe Biden exited the 2024 election.

title: Biden exited 2024 presidential race but remains president | Fact check
shortDescription: Biden said dropping out of the presidential race would allow him to focus on fulfilling his term, which ends in January 2025.

title: Could Hillary Clinton replace Biden?
shortDescription: Biden bowed out of the presidential race and endorsed Kamala Harris, but other names are being suggested. Could Hillary Clinton be one of them?

title: What is VP Kamala Harris' stance on the war in Gaza?
shortDescription: President Joe Biden announced he will not seek reelection and named Vice President Kamala Harris as his successor. What is her stance on Israel?

title: At Vance rally, Ohio senator references civil war to 'save' country
shortDescription: State Sen. George Lang referenced civil war at JD Vance's first hometown rally in Middletown, Ohio.
